ddls:
CREATE TABLE "power_devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name assigned to the device */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model number of the device */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the device is installed */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the device was installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the device (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the device */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network the device belongs to */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Version of the firmware installed on the device */,
  "hardware_version" TEXT /* Version of the hardware of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_power_devices_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_types" (
  "device_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device type */,
  "device_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the device type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_device_type" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "device_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id", "device_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device these settings apply to */,
  "ITRIP_REP" INTEGER /* Indicates whether ITRIP is reported on FAULT */,
  "TSD_MODE" INTEGER /* Indicates the mode for overtemperature conditions */,
  "OTW_REP" INTEGER /* Indicates whether OTW is reported on FAULT */,
  "DIS_CPUV" INTEGER /* Indicates whether charge pump undervoltage fault is enabled */,
  "OCP_TRETRY" TEXT /* Indicates the overcurrent retry time */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the settings were last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the settings */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the settings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_settings_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_settings_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES power_devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_settings_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fault_logs" (
  "fault_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fault log entry */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device that experienced the fault */,
  "fault_type" TEXT /* Type of fault that occurred */,
  "fault_date" TEXT /* Date when the fault occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fault and any actions taken */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date when the fault was resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the fault */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fault_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fault_logs_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fault_logs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES power_devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user within the organization */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department FOREIGN KEY ("department") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the user accessed the system */,
  "actions_taken" TEXT /* Description of actions taken by the user during the session */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "manager" TEXT /* Name of the department manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_audit" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device that was changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made to the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_audit_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES power_devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_audit_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "networks" (
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network */,
  "network_name" TEXT /* Name of the network */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the network */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("network_id")
)
